name: Fresh Garden Vegetable Pottage (Virgo)
recipeIngredient: 4 cups beef broth, or fish stock
2 cups russet potatoes, scrubbed and cut into 1-inch cubes
1/2 cup lowfat cheddar cheese, finely shredded - divided use
2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley, divided use
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a large saucepan over medium-low heat.
2. Add the leeks, celery, bell pepper, and onions. Sauté until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the beef broth, marjoram, thyme, potatoes, carrots, cabbage, and broccoli. Bring to a boil.
4. When the stew reaches boiling point, reduce heat, partially cover, and simmer until all vegetables are tender, about 20 minutes. Add additional broth as needed and salt and pepper to taste.
5. Ladle the stew into four serving bowls. Top each with 2 tablespoons of cheese and sprinkle with parsley. Makes 4 servings.
